concerns.text: T026 (synthetic dataset generator) DEPENDS ON: T028 (power-analysis utility). This is a circular dependency violation. Synthetic data must be generated EARLY to validate the pipeline, including power analysis. T026 should be independent or depend only on foundational tasks (T006-T012), not on T028 which itself depends on T025 (validator).

T028 (power-analysis utility) DEPENDS ON: T025 (inconsistency validator). Power analysis determines sample size requirements and should be independent of validation results. This creates an ordering violation where power analysis cannot run until after the validator is complete, but power analysis is needed to determine if the corpus size is adequate.

T050b (publication year extraction verification) DEPENDS ON: T050 (subgroup analysis). Publication year extraction should occur during the extraction phase (T020), not after subgroup analysis. This violates producer-before-consumer ordering.

T052 (subgroup CSV generator) DEPENDS ON: T046 (bias adjustment unit tests). Should depend on T050 (subgroup analysis implementation) instead. T046 is a test task, not a producer of the artifact T052 consumes.

T079 (SC-024 verification) DEPENDS ON: T046 (bias adjustment unit tests). Should depend on T047 (CSV summary generator) which produces the artifact being verified. T046 does not produce the summary_report.csv.
T013 (Dockerfile) DEPENDS ON: T012 (CI workflow). Dockerfile should be independent of CI workflow configuration. This creates unnecessary ordering constraint.
T076 (checksums verification) DEPENDS ON: T095a which is NOT DEFINED in tasks.md. Missing task reference breaks the dependency chain.
T097b (CI Constitution check) is a duplicate of T095c. Both verify the same CI step for Constitution Principles I-VII. This creates redundant tasks with identical dependencies.

T062 (Monte Carlo validation) should run BEFORE or in parallel with T023 (statistical reconstruction), not after. T062 validates the statistical test implementations that T023 uses. Current ordering allows T023 to run with unvalidated statistical logic.

T044 (Power Analysis utility) duplicates T028's functionality. T044 depends on T028, creating confusion about which task is the primary power analysis implementation. Should consolidate or clarify distinct purposes.
